To keep and to hold all that is
good in the state highway laws
that Is good for the good roads
movement, to trim out and amend
all that Is bad and a drawback to
the cause and to capture an inter-
state good roads convention Tor
Spokane, for next year, a score of
enterprising and thrifty farmers
and business men will leave here
tonight for Aberdeen, Wash. They
are off for the state good roads
convention to be held in that city
Wednesday and Thursday of this
week.


Following is the program for the
two days session:

of Aberdeen, by president of cham

M. E. Hay; reply and annual ad-
dress by Samuel Hill, president
Washington Good Roads associa-
ton. J. ]. Donovan, Bellingham,
presiding.
